input: Grade this IELTS task 2 essay: 'Some people think that the internet has improved our lives. To what extent do you agree?' Essay: The internet has changed everything. I agree fully. We can talk to anyone. It is very good for students. They can learn anything. So yes, internet is great.
description: Examiner grades IELTS essay with rubric

Grade this IELTS task 2: 'Some people say that the best way to learn a language is to live in a country where it is spoken.' Essay: Language learning requires immersion. I totally agree. When you live in a country you hear it every day. You pick up words fast. So immersion is the best.
Grade IELTS task 2 about technology in education. 'Technology in education has made learning easier but also more challenging. Discuss both views.'
IELTS speaking part 1: Tell me about your hometown. Response: I'm from Jakarta. It's very big. Many people. Traffic is bad. I don't like. That's all.
TOEFL independent essay: Do you agree or disagree with the following statement: 'It is better to work for a large company than a small company.' Essay of 350 words.
description: Examiner grades TOEFL essay with full rubric
